summary.goal: Remove F7 LLM summarize feature and revert config split — llmgraph should be a storage/navigation tool, not an LLM client
decisions: Removed llmgraph node summarize command and reqwest dependency entirely — node edit is the right primitive for writing summaries
Reverted config split (config.local.toml) since the only sensitive data was the LLM API key, which no longer exists in the codebase
Kept .llmgraph/.gitignore covering state.json and transcripts/ since those are still session/personal artifacts
